full_text:
Shi Yi (Ziyu) 是儀 (子羽)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Yi (是儀), styledZiyu (子羽), was born in Beihai. Mocked by Kong Rong into altering his name. Agreed with Lü Meng’s plans against Guan Yu. Shi Yi was affiliated with Kong Rong, Liu Yao, and the Wu Kingdom.
